Cang Xun ŚÄČśĀā
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cang Xun (ŚÄČśĀā). Son of Cang Ci. Served as a military official in Jinping. Cang Xun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
